name: Let's Go Together
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>めてはしろ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>二人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふたり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ではしろ
name_jp_rom: Tsutomete wa Shiro Futari de Hashiro
name_jp_tl: Dawn is White, the Two of Us Run Together
desc: If you have no "Let's Go Together" in your face-up field, GY, nor banishment: Banish 7 cards from the top of your Deck, face-down; make your opponent banish 7 cards from their Extra Deck and/or top of their Deck, face-down, and they must declare how many are banished from each beforehand.
eff: If you have no "Let's Go Together" in your face-up field, GY, nor banishment: Banish 7 cards from the top of your Deck, face-down; make your opponent banish 7 cards from their Extra Deck and/or top of their Deck, face-down, and they must declare how many are banished from each beforehand.

banished: Banishes from the top of your Deck for cost
Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
Banishes from your opponent's Extra Deck
